author: alejandro
name: Kitchen Sink V2 Improved: ResidLambdas + BigBigram + BigVE + FA3
blurb: PR #549 base with split early/late LR banks, MiLe margin loss, cache+backout residual, LeakyReLU(0.5), XSA on last 7 layers, coprime-stride data loader, residual lambdas (learnable per-sublayer scaling), bigger bigram hash (6144 buckets), bigger value embeddings (dim=196, layers 5,9,10), Flash Attention 3, train-data GPTQ int6 calibration within training budget, and sliding window eval (stride=64). Hyperparameters tuned via Optuna.
